body:
The sofa to withstand any multi pet household! Check out our new customized pet friendly sofa from @interiordefine Gatsby’s favorite spot is the chaise 👇 Use “ELAINE20” for 20% off. 

This is the Sloan 3-Seat Reversible Chaise Sectional!

We picked the Performance Antimicrobial Chenille fabric because it’s durable enough to withstand sharp claws and snagging. Plus, it’s water and stain resistant.

I love that all the cushions have removable covers so I can easily wash them anytime.

Highly recommended if you want something stylish and functional for a multi pet household! #InteriorDefinePartner
#petfriendlysofa #petfriendlyhome

body:
✨ AD | Partnering with @interiordefine has been such a dream. ✨ #InteriorDefinePartner

One of my favorite parts of designing this space was creating a sofa that’s truly custom for my family. With Interior Define, I was able to order free swatches online, choose the perfect fabric + color, and design a piece that feels both timeless and personal.

The quality is incredible, the process was seamless, and now this sofa is the heart of our living room—where cozy mornings, family movie nights, and all the little in-between moments happen. 🖤

If you’re looking to bring your vision to life, Interior Define makes it so simple to design furniture that’s made just for you.

#InteriorDefine #CustomMade

body:
I loved my living room, but it was feeling kind of thrown together. I wanted to be really careful and intentional about my upholstered furniture so I got several samples from @interiodefine and weighted the options of textures, colors, and styles. I found two I just loved... and here they are. This is the Alexander roll arm sofa with classic caster feet, and the Caitlin sofa in a performance velvet skirted style. This fabric is so soft AND durable, and I love the traditional lines on this one. I customized the length, depth, cushions, and more about both of these. My discount code is SUZANNAH20 for 20% off your order and I’m sharing all the details of my orders of these on my blog this week. #InteriorDefinePartner

Comment SHOP below to receive a DM with the link to this post on my LTK ⬇ https://liketk.it/5jIRq

This is the Sloan 3-Seat Reversible Chaise Sectional!

We picked the Performance Antimicrobial Chenille fabric because it’s durable enough to withstand sharp claws and snagging. Plus, it’s water and stain resistant.

I love that all the cushions have removable covers so I can easily wash them anytime.

Highly recommended if you want something stylish and functional for a multi pet household! #InteriorDefinePartner
#petfriendlysofa #petfriendlyhome

body:
I loved my living room, but it was feeling kind of thrown together. I wanted to be really careful and intentional about my upholstered furniture so I got several samples from @interiodefine and weighted the options of textures, colors, and styles. I found two I just loved... and here they are. This is the Alexander roll arm sofa with classic caster feet, and the Caitlin sofa in a performance velvet skirted style. This fabric is so soft AND durable, and I love the traditional lines on this one. I customized the length, depth, cushions, and more about both of these. My discount code is SUZANNAH20 for 20% off your order and I’m sharing all the details of my orders of these on my blog this week. #InteriorDefinePartner

Comment SHOP below to receive a DM with the link to this post on my LTK ⬇ https://liketk.it/5jIRq

I loved my living room, but it was feeling kind of thrown together. I wanted to be really careful and intentional about my upholstered furniture so I got several samples from @interiodefine and weighted the options of textures, colors, and styles. I found two I just loved... and here they are. This is the Alexander roll arm sofa with classic caster feet, and the Caitlin sofa in a performance velvet skirted style. This fabric is so soft AND durable, and I love the traditional lines on this one. I customized the length, depth, cushions, and more about both of these. My discount code is SUZANNAH20 for 20% off your order and I’m sharing all the details of my orders of these on my blog this week. #InteriorDefinePartner

body:
The sofa to withstand any multi pet household! Check out our new customized pet friendly sofa from @interiordefine Gatsby’s favorite spot is the chaise 👇 Use “ELAINE20” for 20% off. 

This is the Sloan 3-Seat Reversible Chaise Sectional!

We picked the Performance Antimicrobial Chenille fabric because it’s durable enough to withstand sharp claws and snagging. Plus, it’s water and stain resistant.

I love that all the cushions have removable covers so I can easily wash them anytime.

Highly recommended if you want something stylish and functional for a multi pet household! #InteriorDefinePartner
#petfriendlysofa #petfriendlyhome
